text:
Once upon a time in the charming village of Everridge, there was a wise old tortoise named Timothy. Timothy was known far and wide for his deep wisdom. He could listen for hours to the troubles and dreams of the other creatures.

One sunny afternoon, a young porpoise named Pippin came up to Timothy. "Sir," Pippin said proudly, "I want to learn everything there is to know about the sea."

"What a marvelous goal!" Timothy replied. "First, you must learn the secrets of the depths. It's difficult but rewarding." He paused. "And what is your favorite thing about the sea?"

Pippin thought. "Well," he said, grinning, "I love exploring, meeting all kinds of creatures, diving into the crystal blue water…"

"And why would you do that?" Timothy asked.

"Well," pondered Pippin, sighing contentedly, "To swim among the stars."
